incidents.detail: Booked for a reckless challenge on Vinícius Júnior down the left flank, catching the Brazilian winger dangerously high.
Clinical right-footed finish from 18 yards after a brilliant one-two with Vinícius Júnior on the right wing, nestling the ball inside the far post.
Cautioned for protesting a non-call, gesturing aggressively at the referee after being denied a penalty claim.
Excellent left-footed finish from inside the box after latching onto Wataru Endo's perfectly weighted through ball down the middle.
Booked for a sliding challenge from behind on Alex Sandro after losing possession in midfield.
Curling left-footed strike into the top corner from 20 yards after cutting inside from the left wing and shifting the ball onto his favoured foot.
